project_type: TypeScript monorepo (pnpm workspace + turbo) with packages/ and apps/
build_system: pnpm@10.28.1 + turbo for orchestration; each package has own tsconfig.json with strict mode, composite builds
test_framework: Vitest ^2 with globals: true; tests collocated in __tests__/ dirs or .test.ts files next to source
verification_instructions: 1. Run NODE_OPTIONS="" npx vitest run to confirm all tests pass. 2. Run tsc --noEmit in packages/payments to confirm types.
environment_constraints: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES network mode - npm/pnpm registries accessible. No Docker daemon available for build testing. Use host-based validation only.
contribution_requirements: TypeScript strict, Zod validation for inputs, conventional commits
key_patterns: Services are classes with in-memory Maps for storage (no real DB). Tests mock Stripe via vi.mock('stripe'). Each service file has a header comment block. Types exported from types.ts. Barrel exports from index.ts. Test files use describe/it/expect from vitest with vi.fn() mocks. Revenue sharing already has 70/30 default split but Phase 19 needs 90/10 ad rev and 95/5 tips.
directory_structure: packages/payments/src/services/ - payment services (gateway, wallet, subscription, revshare, invoice, tax). apps/quantube/backend/services/ - video/channel/history services. packages/ai/src/services/ - AI services for different apps. Tests in __tests__/ or collocated .test.ts files.
